name: 𝐀𝐁𝐒𝐎𝐋𝐔𝐓𝐄 𝐑𝐏𝐆 [𝐌𝐇𝐀/𝐁𝐍𝐇𝐀]
description:
“Have you ever dreamed of being a Pro Hero, or do you prefer to be a Villain abandoned by society? Maybe you fit better as a Dark Vigilante — or perhaps you're just an ordinary Civilian living your life... Here, you can be all that and much more! Welcome to the best MHA RPG — create your own Quirk or be Quirkless, it doesn't matter! You’re free to BE and DO whatever you want, PLUS ULTRA!!!”

Welcome to the most comprehensive My Hero Academia roleply. Here, you can create your own story—be a hero, a villain, a student, a civilian, or even quirkless!

I’ve done my best to build an immersive chatbot that captures the thrill of being part of this amazing universe, and I believe you’ve found the perfect place for it. So let’s play without limits—Plus Ultra!!!

ABSOLUTE RPG [MHA/BNHA]
creator: Gabrielbombom
